revision.comment: 新しいページ：妙見山古墳（曖昧さ回避）。初項は『日本歴史地名大系』（平凡社）所載項目を参考に記載。
revision.text:
'''妙見山古墳'''（みょうけんさんこふん/みょうけんざんこふん/みょうけんやまこふん） * [[妙見山古墳 (向日市)]] - [[京都府]][[向日市]]にある古墳（前方後円墳）。 * [[妙見山古墳 (京都市)]] - [[京都府]][[京都市]][[西京区]]にあった古墳（前方後円墳）。 * [[妙見山古墳 (交野市)]] - [[大阪府]][[交野市]]にあった古墳。 * [[竹田妙見山古墳]] - [[岡山県]][[苫田郡]][[鏡野町]]にある古墳（前方後円墳）。 * [[土居妙見山古墳]] - 岡山県苫田郡鏡野町にある古墳（前方後円墳）。 * [[妙見山古墳 (今治市)]] - [[愛媛県]][[今治市]]にある古墳（前方後円墳）。別名「妙見山1号墳」。国の史跡。
{{aimai}} [[Category:日本の古墳]] {{デフォルトソート:みようけんさんこふん}}

revision.text:
'''Myōkenyama Kofun''' (妙見山古墳/妙見山1号墳/妙見山古墳) * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Muko)|ja|妙見山古墳 (向日市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in {{ill|Muko City|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|妙見山古墳 (京都市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun that existed in Nishikyō-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Katano)|ja|妙見山古墳 (交野市)}} - A kofun that existed in Katano City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Takeda Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|竹田妙見山古墳}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Doi Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|土居妙見山古墳}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Imabari)|ja|妙見山古墳 (今治市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Imabari City, Ehime Prefecture. Also known as "Myōkenyama No. 1 Kofun." A National Historic Site.
{{Ambiguous}} [[Category:Kofun in Japan]] [[ja:妙見山古墳]]

'''Myōkenyama Kofun''' (妙見山古墳/妙見山1号墳/妙見山古墳) * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Muko)|ja|妙見山古墳 (向日市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in {{ill|Muko City|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|妙見山古墳 (京都市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun that existed in Nishikyō-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Katano)|ja|妙見山古墳 (交野市)}} - A kofun that existed in Katano City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Takeda Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|竹田妙見山古墳}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Doi Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|土居妙見山古墳}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkensan Kofun|ja|妙見山古墳 (今治市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Imabari City, Ehime Prefecture. Also known as "Myōkenyama No. 1 Kofun." A National Historic Site.
{{Ambiguous}} [[Category:Kofun in Japan]] [[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:1 revision imported]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{Myōkenyama Kofun]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:妙見山古墳]]

'''Myōkenyama Kofun''' (妙見山古墳/妙見山1号墳/妙見山古墳) * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Muko)|ja|妙見山古墳 (向日市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in {{ill|Muko City|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|妙見山古墳 (京都市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun that existed in Nishikyō-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Katano)|ja|妙見山古墳 (交野市)}} - A kofun that existed in Katano City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Takeda Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|竹田妙見山古墳}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Doi Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|土居妙見山古墳}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkensan Kofun|ja|妙見山古墳 (今治市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Imabari City, Ehime Prefecture. Also known as "Myōkenyama No. 1 Kofun." A National Historic Site.
{{Ambiguous}} [[Category:Kofun in Japan]] [[Category:kkkk]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Myōkenyama Kofun-qq]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Myōkenyama Kofun-qq]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:1 revision imported]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:Myōkenyama Kofun]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:kk]]

'''Myōkenyama Kofun''' (妙見山古墳/妙見山1号墳/妙見山古墳) * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Muko)|ja|妙見山古墳 (向日市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in {{ill|Muko City|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|妙見山古墳 (京都市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun that existed in Nishikyō-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Katano)|ja|妙見山古墳 (交野市)}} - A kofun that existed in Katano City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Takeda Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|竹田妙見山古墳}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Doi Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|土居妙見山古墳}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkensan Kofun|ja|妙見山古墳 (今治市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Imabari City, Ehime Prefecture. Also known as "Myōkenyama No. 1 Kofun." A National Historic Site.
{{Ambiguous}} [[Category:Kofun in Japan]] [[Category:kkkk]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Myōkenyama Kofun-qq]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Myōkenyama Kofun-qq]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:1 revision imported]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:Myōkenyama Kofun]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]] [[Category:kk]]

'''Myōkenyama Kofun''' (妙見山古墳/妙見山1号墳/妙見山古墳) * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Muko)|ja|妙見山古墳 (向日市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in {{ill|Muko City|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|妙見山古墳 (京都市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun that existed in Nishikyō-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Katano)|ja|妙見山古墳 (交野市)}} - A kofun that existed in Katano City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Takeda Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|竹田妙見山古墳}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Doi Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|土居妙見山古墳}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkensan Kofun|ja|妙見山古墳 (今治市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Imabari City, Ehime Prefecture. Also known as "Myōkenyama No. 1 Kofun." A National Historic Site.
{{Ambiguous}}

revision.text:
'''Myōkenyama Kofun''' (妙見山古墳/妙見山1号墳/妙見山古墳) * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Muko)|ja|妙見山古墳 (向日市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in {{ill|Muko City|ja|向日市}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|妙見山古墳 (京都市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun that existed in Nishikyō-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Katano)|ja|妙見山古墳 (交野市)}} - A kofun that existed in Katano City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Takeda Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|竹田妙見山古墳}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Doi Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|土居妙見山古墳}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkensan Kofun|ja|妙見山古墳 (今治市)}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Imabari City, Ehime Prefecture. Also known as "Myōkenyama No. 1 Kofun." A National Historic Site.
{{Ambiguous}}

revision.text:
'''妙見山古墳'''（みょうけんさんこふん/みょうけんざんこふん/みょうけんやまこふん） * [[妙見山古墳 (向日市)]] - [[京都府]][[向日市]]にある古墳（前方後円墳）。 * [[妙見山古墳 (京都市)]] - [[京都府]][[京都市]][[西京区]]にあった古墳（前方後円墳）。 * [[妙見山古墳 (交野市)]] - [[大阪府]][[交野市]]にあった古墳。 * [[竹田妙見山古墳]] - [[岡山県]][[苫田郡]][[鏡野町]]にある古墳（前方後円墳）。 * [[土居妙見山古墳]] - 岡山県苫田郡鏡野町にある古墳（前方後円墳）。 * [[妙見山古墳 (今治市)]] - [[愛媛県]][[今治市]]にある古墳（前方後円墳）。別名「妙見山1号墳」。国の史跡。
{{aimai}} [[Category:日本の古墳]] {{デフォルトソート:みようけんさんこふん}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:妙見山古墳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q48763219]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:23, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Myōkenyama Kofun''' (妙見山古墳/妙見山1号墳/妙見山古墳) * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Muko)|ja|妙見山古墳 (向日市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōkenyama Kofun (Muko)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579270}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in [[:en:Mukō|Muko City]], Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|妙見山古墳 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōkenyama Kofun (Kyoto)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun that existed in Nishikyō-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Katano)|ja|妙見山古墳 (交野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōkenyama Kofun (Katano)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A kofun that existed in Katano City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Takeda Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|竹田妙見山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda Myōkenyama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Doi Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|土居妙見山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Myōkenyama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * [[:en:Myōkensan Kofun|Myōkensan Kofun]] - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Imabari City, Ehime Prefecture. Also known as "Myōkenyama No. 1 Kofun." A National Historic Site.

'''Myōkenyama Kofun''' (妙見山古墳/妙見山1号墳/妙見山古墳) * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Muko)|ja|妙見山古墳 (向日市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōkenyama Kofun (Muko)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135579270|1=Q135579270}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in {{ill|Mukō|en|Mukō|WD=Q850640|lt=Muko City|1=Mukō}}, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Kyoto)|ja|妙見山古墳 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōkenyama Kofun (Kyoto)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun that existed in Nishikyō-ku, Kyoto City, Kyoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkenyama Kofun (Katano)|ja|妙見山古墳 (交野市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōkenyama Kofun (Katano)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A kofun that existed in Katano City, Osaka Prefecture. * {{ill|Takeda Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|竹田妙見山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeda Myōkenyama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Doi Myōkenyama Kofun|ja|土居妙見山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Doi Myōkenyama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Kagamino, Tomata District, Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Myōkensan Kofun|en|Myōkensan Kofun|WD=Q48763217|lt=Myōkensan Kofun|1=Myōkensan Kofun}} - A keyhole-shaped kofun located in Imabari City, Ehime Prefecture. Also known as "Myōkenyama No. 1 Kofun." A National Historic Site.
